rules.description: Hardcoded credentials detected (SECRET/PASSWORD/API_KEY/TOKEN with inline value)
String-concatenated SQL query — potential injection vector
Dynamic eval() or exec() call — arbitrary code execution risk
__import__() call — dynamic module loading bypass risk
print() debug statement left in production logic
Path-traversal sequence detected (../ or ..\) — OWASP A01:2021 Broken Access Control
Auto-captured by Tribunal during heal: dynamic-eval
Auto-captured by Tribunal during heal: hardcoded-secret
Auto-captured by Tribunal during heal: sql-injection
Auto-captured by Tribunal during heal: dynamic-exec
Direct innerHTML assignment from API/user data — XSS risk (OWASP A03:2025). Use esc() / textContent instead.
HTTP request with user-supplied URL without allowlist validation — SSRF risk (OWASP A10:2025).
subprocess.run/Popen with shell=True and variable input — command injection (OWASP A03:2025).
pickle.loads() on untrusted data — arbitrary code execution (OWASP A08:2025). Use json/msgpack instead.
JWT/session token created without expiry claim — authentication bypass risk (OWASP A07:2025).
JWT algorithm='none' — signature verification bypass (OWASP A02:2025). Always enforce RS256/ES256.
CORS allow-origin wildcard (*) on credentialed endpoint — cross-origin data theft (OWASP A01:2025).
XML parsed with external entities enabled (resolve_entities=True) — XXE injection (OWASP A05:2025).
**kwargs or request JSON passed directly to ORM create/update — mass assignment (OWASP A01:2025).
Object accessed by user-supplied ID without ownership check — IDOR (OWASP A01:2025). Always verify requester owns the resource.
TOCTOU: os.path.exists() check followed by file operation without lock — race condition vulnerability.
User-controlled string in logger.info/warning without sanitization — log injection / log forging risk.
Jinja2 Template(user_input) — server-side template injection RCE (OWASP A03:2025). Use Environment with autoescape.
redirect() with unvalidated user-supplied URL — open redirect phishing vector (OWASP A01:2025).
MD5 used for security/authentication hashing — cryptographic failure (OWASP A02:2025). Use SHA-256 or stronger.
SHA1 used for password or secret hashing — weak cryptography (OWASP A02:2025). Use bcrypt/argon2 for passwords.
debug=True in production server config — information disclosure (OWASP A05:2025). Always disable in prod.
Cookie set without Secure + HttpOnly flags — session hijacking risk (OWASP A07:2025).
File upload without MIME type and size validation — arbitrary file execution / DoS risk.
chmod 777 or sudo in application code — privilege escalation risk. Use least-privilege IAM instead.
HTML page served without Content-Security-Policy header — XSS amplification risk (OWASP A05:2025).
Bare except: clause without logging — silently swallows all exceptions, masks root cause.
except: pass — completely silences all exceptions, a debugging nightmare. Always log or re-raise.
Mutable default argument (list/dict/set) in function def — shared state across calls antipattern.
Unreachable code after return/raise/break — dead code should be removed.
Unexplained numeric/string literal in business logic — use named constants for maintainability.
TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX comment in production code path — track in issue tracker, not in code.
Global variable mutated inside a function — Law 17 stateless processor violation; causes race conditions under ThreadPoolExecutor.
Public API function missing return type annotation — reduces IDE support and static analysis coverage.
String concatenation inside loop — O(n²) memory. Use list append + ''.join() pattern.
Function cyclomatic complexity > 15 — split into smaller, testable units. Max 10 is the SOTA 2026 standard.
ORM query inside a loop — N+1 query problem. Use select_related/prefetch_related or batch queries.
time.sleep() inside async function — blocks the event loop. Use asyncio.sleep() instead.
Database query without LIMIT clause — unbounded result set, memory exhaustion risk.
Synchronous file I/O (open/read/write) inside async function — blocks event loop. Use anyio.open_file or run_sync_in_worker_thread.
re.compile() called inside a loop — compiles regex on every iteration. Compile once at module level.
list() wrapping a generator before single-pass iteration — allocates unnecessary memory. Iterate the generator directly.
Expensive repeated computation (LLM call, DB query, heavy calculation) without caching — latency amplification.
User input concatenated directly into LLM system/user prompt without sanitization — prompt injection attack vector. Always separate user content from instructions.
LLM-generated code or text executed via eval/exec — arbitrary code execution through model output. Never execute model output directly.
PII (email, phone, SSN, DOB, health data) included in LLM prompt — data privacy violation, may breach GDPR/CCPA/HIPAA.
System prompt, agent instructions, or tool configuration returned to user or logged — instruction disclosure risk.
RAG-retrieved content injected into system prompt without validation — indirect prompt injection. Validate and sanitize retrieved chunks.
LLM response presented as fact without confidence grounding or source citation — OWASP LLM09:2025 Misinformation.
Cloud storage bucket configured with public access — data exposure. Always require authenticated access.
IAM policy with Action: * or Resource: * — over-permissive access. Apply least-privilege principle.
Admin, destructive, or privileged action executed without structured audit log entry — compliance and forensics gap.
Secret value stored as plaintext in CI/CD environment variables or config files — use Secret Manager / Vault.
Firewall rule allowing 0.0.0.0/0 ingress on non-HTTP(S) ports — network exposure. Restrict to required CIDR ranges.
Public API endpoint without rate limiting — DoS and credential-stuffing risk. Use token-bucket or sliding-window limiter.
POST/PUT/PATCH endpoint accepting raw request body without Pydantic/schema validation — injection and type confusion risk.
Admin or destructive API endpoint without authentication dependency injection — unauthorized access.
List endpoint returning all records without pagination — memory exhaustion and response-time DoS for large datasets.
HTTP 500 response exposing raw exception traceback to caller — information disclosure. Return structured error with correlation ID only.
Attempt to set CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD < 0.3 — Law 14 violation. Minimum operational threshold is 0.30.
DAG edge that would create a cycle — violates acyclicity invariant (Pipeline Invariant #1). CognitiveGraph raises CycleDetectedError.
Processing node storing mutable instance state between invocations — Law 17 stateless processor violation; causes race conditions under JITExecutor fan-out.
LLM model name hardcoded as string literal in engine code — always use ModelGarden/config.py. Violates single source of truth.
New engine execution path that does not pass through Tribunal.evaluate() — mandatory security scan bypass (copilot-instructions.md §3).
Mandate or chat handler that skips JITBooster.fetch() — violates Pipeline Invariant #10 (jit_boost field required in all mandate responses).
boosted_confidence set > 1.0 or < original_confidence — violates Pipeline Invariant #11.
Dockerfile without HEALTHCHECK instruction — container failures are undetectable by orchestrators.
Docker image pinned to :latest tag — non-reproducible builds, silent upgrade risk. Always pin to digest or version tag.
Container deployed without CPU/memory resource limits — noisy-neighbour resource starvation in shared cluster.
Service without OpenTelemetry instrumentation — violates 2026 observability standard. Instrument traces, metrics, and logs from day one.
Service without SBOM generation (CycloneDX/SPDX) — supply-chain compliance gap 2026. Generate via cyclonedx-bom or syft in CI.
print() or plain string logging without JSON structured format and correlation ID — unqueryable in Grafana/Loki/Cloud Logging.
FastAPI/Flask app without explicit CORS policy middleware — open CORS misconfiguration by default.
Git commit message not following Conventional Commits spec — blocks automated CHANGELOG, semantic versioning, and release notes.
Third-party library imported without type stubs or py.typed marker — degrades IDE IntelliSense and mypy coverage.
Frontend renders data from API without esc() / DOMPurify sanitization — 2026 WCAG + CSP baseline requires all dynamic content escaped.
